meaning: n.泵,抽水机vt.(用泵)抽(水),抽吸
examples: The pump sucks air out through the valve.
I left my purse back there on the gas pump.
The pump doesn't work and we have no running water.
And here we are under the impression that rising pump prices were due to strengthening demand!
There was an added intention of restoring the Scottish-made beam engine pump machinery to full working order.
